acceptance.assertion: Mechanic and Captain action envelopes have one canonical structured representation.
action is canonical and grip remains only a validated alias.
Receipt hashes, receipt paths, target/scope objects, and bounded output rules are validated consistently.

goal: Replace ad-hoc Mechanic/Captain action-envelope dict validation with explicit dataclass or schema-backed validation while preserving fail-closed behavior.

metadata.reason: Schema/dataclass migration is broader than the immediate PR #96 hardening.

title: Add structured action envelope validation
